items.title: Florida man arrested after arguing with a bag of frozen peas
items.comment: Police report describes the peas as "unresponsive." The peas have not commented.
items.body: According to the report, the disagreement began in the frozen aisle and escalated in the parking lot, where the peas reportedly "refused to de-escalate." No charges were filed against the peas, who were released on their own recognizance and are now, presumably, thawed.

items.title: DMV requires an appointment to schedule an appointment
items.comment: There is no appointment available to schedule the appointment. The system is working exactly as designed.
items.body: A spokesperson clarified that walk-ins are welcome, but only to receive a pamphlet explaining that walk-ins are not welcome. The pamphlet is available by appointment.

items.title: Man steals an entire ATM, realizes he can't open it
items.comment: He now owns a very heavy, very locked box and a great deal of time to reflect.

items.title: Gas station sells a single egg for $4.99, calls it "artisan"
items.comment: It is one (1) egg. There is nothing artisan about it. And yet.

items.title: HOA fines resident $200 for a doormat that says "Welcome"
items.comment: The board found the tone "aggressively inviting" and "not in keeping with community standards."
items.body: The resident was given 30 days to replace the mat with one expressing "a more neutral sentiment." The board's preferred alternatives include a plain mat, no mat, or a mat that says nothing at all, which is, when you think about it, the most honest option.

items.title: Town votes to ban a word, then can't agree how to announce it
items.comment: The announcement, when it eventually comes, will not contain the word. Probably.

items.title: City installs a crosswalk to nowhere, then a sign warning about it
items.comment: Two departments. Zero conversations. One perfect monument to process.

items.title: Subscription mattress adds a monthly fee to keep lying on it
items.comment: Miss a payment and it doesn't repossess the mattress. It just quietly stops being comfortable.

items.title: Florida man calls 911 to report that his own party is too loud
items.comment: He wanted the noise complaint on record before the neighbors beat him to it. Strategic.

items.title: Highway sign warns drivers about the highway sign ahead
items.comment: That sign warns about traffic. This sign warns about that sign. We are nesting now.
